intro: SUPER 56 challenges players to overcome 56 genre-bending mini-games with the press of a single button. Compete in daily challenges, earn achievements, and destroy high scores.
description:
WELCOME TO HELL
Eons ago, SUPER 56 was banned by the Government of Pain and all copies were buried in the Samsara Desert. Cartridges have now been spotted in independent gaming stores throughout Hell. Roommates Kronos and Brones secured their own copy of the game and challenged their neighbor to a high-scoring bet. But, it turns out they're pretty bad at video games. It’s up to you to achieve an S Rank and shut the pesky neighbor up once and for all.


2 - 8 Player COUCH MULTIPLAYER MODE
Challenge your friends in our new turn-based multiplayer mode! Configure stages and game rules, then jump into the action. hosting a party , this mode is sure to test the strength of your friendships.

WE ARE THE CHAMPIONS
Earn bragging rights as you compete for the top of the worldwide leaderboards. Even after you become a SUPER 56 legend, keep things fresh with Daily Challenges.

PUSH YOUR LIMITS
A wide range of difficulty levels designed for everyone from beginners to pros.Keep pushing your limits and striving for greatness in SUPER 56.



Key Features:
——56 genre-bending mini-games all designed around the press of a single button.
——Single player campaign.
——2-8 player couch co-op
——Easy to learn, yet hard to master gameplay.
——Unlockable Mod Stones to change the rules of each playthrough.
——Daily challenges and Trials add a new challenge to master.
——References, homages, and ridiculous humor centered around gaming history.
——Fully customizable experience with unlockable characters, voice packs, ludicrous phrases, and more.
——Awesome, genre-changing soundtrack.
——Achievements galore!
